_readme: Edit this file to configure the dashboard. It is NOT bundled — safe to update without rebuilding.
_jobsLimitNote: Omit jobsLimit (recommended) to let the API use its own default. Set only if you need an explicit cap — values above 1000 can trigger a CTM SaaS 500 error.
_proxyNote: In production, your web server must proxy /ctm-api/* → https://<your-ctm-host>/automation-api/*  (see nginx.example.conf)
_appMetadataNote: Per-application overrides for the DR report. Keys are exact CTM application names. All fields are optional — omitted fields fall back to inferred defaults.

_appMetadataDefaults._note: Defaults applied when an app is not listed in appMetadata above.
